---
title: "Disposition - Screening"
subtitle: "Summary of Subject Screening Status"
execute:
  echo: true
  eval: true
---


```{r}
#| label: prereqs
#| include: false
library(arframe)
fr_theme(hlines = "header", font_family = "Courier New")
```

## Setup

See [Prerequisites](../install.qmd) for installation instructions.

```{r}
#| label: setup
library(arframe)
library(pharmaverseadam)
library(dplyr, warn.conflicts = FALSE)

blank_to_na <- function(df) {
  df[] <- lapply(df, function(x) {
    if (is.character(x)) x[x == ""] <- NA_character_
    x
  })
  df
}

adsl <- pharmaverseadam::adsl |> blank_to_na()
```


## Data Preparation

```{r}
#| label: data-prep
N_screened <- nrow(adsl)

screen_fail_n <- sum(adsl$TRT01A == "Screen Failure", na.rm = TRUE)
enrolled_n    <- sum(adsl$TRT01A != "Screen Failure", na.rm = TRUE)
randomized_n  <- sum(!is.na(adsl$RANDDT))

screen_wide <- data.frame(
  stat_label = c(
    "Screened",
    "Screen Failures",
    "Enrolled",
    "Randomized"
  ),
  value = c(
    sprintf("%d", N_screened),
    sprintf("%d (%.1f)", screen_fail_n, screen_fail_n / N_screened * 100),
    sprintf("%d (%.1f)", enrolled_n, enrolled_n / N_screened * 100),
    sprintf("%d (%.1f)", randomized_n, randomized_n / N_screened * 100)
  ),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
```


## arframe Pipeline

The `fr_table()` pipeline is the same regardless of how the data was prepared:

```{r}
#| label: pipeline
#| eval: false
screen_wide |>
  fr_table() |>
  fr_titles(
    "Table 14.1.1",
    "Summary of Subject Screening Status",
    "All Subjects"
  ) |>
  fr_cols(
    stat_label = fr_col("", width = 3.0),
    value      = fr_col("n (%)", align = "decimal", width = 2.0)
  ) |>
  fr_header(bold = TRUE, align = "center") |>
  fr_footnotes(
    "Percentages based on total screened subjects.",
    "CDISCPILOT01 All Subjects."
  )
```


## Rendered Table

```{r}
#| label: table
#| echo: false
#| ref.label: pipeline
```
